schema.description: The base URL for your Adobe Commerce REST API (e.g., https://commerce.example.com)
schema.label: Commerce REST API Base URL
schema.name: restApiBaseUrl

schema.description: Commerce integration consumer key (for OAuth 1.0a - PaaS/On-Premise)
schema.label: Consumer Key
schema.name: consumerKey

schema.description: Commerce integration consumer secret (for OAuth 1.0a - PaaS/On-Premise)
schema.label: Consumer Secret
schema.name: consumerSecret

schema.description: Adobe IMS client ID (for SaaS authentication)
schema.label: IMS Client ID
schema.name: imsClientId

schema.description: Adobe IMS client secret (for SaaS authentication)
schema.label: IMS Client Secret
schema.name: imsClientSecret

metadata.description: Provides store locator functionality with interactive maps and product availability
